headline: EUR/USD rises to 1.1811, up 0.14% — 12-month strength
analysis: Euro strengthens despite ECB headwinds. EUR/USD +13.81% over 12 months offsets month-to-date weakness. ECB policy remains accommodative; dollar pressure expected to persist.

headline: ECB reports third consecutive annual loss in 2025 — revaluation impact
analysis: ECB books EUR 3B+ loss due to lingering impact of record rate hike cycle. Revaluation losses on portfolio positions. Signals end of rate-hiking regime; neutral to dovish bias for policy ahead.

headline: S&P 500 and NASDAQ post worst month since March 2025 — AI volatility continues
analysis: Tech-heavy Nasdaq down significantly; S&P 500 flat for year. AI sector concerns, macro risks (private credit stress), and valuation pressures. Private credit contagion risks dominate headlines.

headline: Bitcoin range-bound $54,000–$72,000 in March — US ETFs net sellers in 2026
analysis: BTC fell below 66K; prediction markets show 60%+ bearish below $50K. US spot ETFs (net buyers '25) turned net sellers '26. Sentiment extremes suggest volatility ahead.

headline: Gold surges past $5,300/oz on US-Israel strikes on Iran — safe-haven demand spike
analysis: Gold breaks higher on geopolitical escalation. US-Israeli strikes on Iran trigger rush to safe assets. Spot gold +10% month-to-date. JP Morgan and Wells Fargo now target $6,300 by year-end (+22% from current).

headline: STOXX Europe 600 touches new highs — diversification flows away from US tech
analysis: Pan-European index up 0.52% locally as investors diversify beyond US tech concentration. Robust earnings support. DAX, CAC stable to positive. European relative strength vs US continues.
